title: Custom Pet Embroidery Hoop – Personalized Hand Embroidered Pet Portrait, Unique Dog or Cat Gift
material: Cotton thread on linen, bamboo hoop
metaTitle: Custom Pet Embroidery Hoop – Personalized Hand Embroidered Portrait Gift
metaDescription: Turn your pet photo into a custom hand embroidery hoop. Cotton thread on linen, bamboo hoop, 6-8 inch. Unique gift for dog or cat lovers. Order now!
shortDescription: Personalized hand-embroidered pet portrait on linen in a bamboo hoop. A heartfelt gift for pet lovers.
fullDescription:
Celebrate your furry friend with a one-of-a-kind custom pet embroidery hoop. Each piece is meticulously hand-embroidered using high-quality cotton thread on natural linen, capturing the unique personality and charm of your beloved dog, cat, or other pet. The finished portrait is stretched and displayed in a classic bamboo hoop, ready to hang on your wall or sit on a shelf as a timeless keepsake.

**Why choose our custom pet embroidery?**
- **Emotional connection:** Every stitch is a tribute to your pet’s unique features—from floppy ears to soulful eyes.
- **Handcrafted quality:** Skilled artisans create each portrait with care, ensuring lasting beauty.
- **Versatile decor:** The 6 to 8 inch diameter hoop fits seamlessly into any home style, making it a perfect gift for pet lovers, new pet parents, or as a memorial piece.

**Customization process:**
1. Upload a clear, high-resolution photo of your pet (face-forward preferred).
2. Our artist reviews the photo and begins hand-embroidering the portrait.
3. Within 10-14 days, your custom hoop is carefully packaged and shipped to you.

**Product specifications:**
- Material: Cotton thread on natural linen, bamboo embroidery hoop
- Size: 6 inch, 7 inch, or 8 inch diameter
- Production time: 10-14 business days
- Care: Gently dust with a soft brush; avoid direct sunlight to preserve colors

**Perfect for:**
- Birthday or holiday gifts for dog and cat owners
- Commemorating a beloved pet’s life
- Adding a personal touch to your home or office

Make your pet the star of your decor. Order your custom pet embroidery hoop today and give a gift that truly speaks from the heart.
